summary: Do not ship as-is: auto-linking is keyed only by a title-derived slug, so moving a Discuss card can attach another card's stale brief file.

findings.title: Auto-link can attach the wrong brief because the filename convention is not card-unique
findings.recommendation: Do not infer the brief path from `briefSlug(card)` alone. Include a card-unique component in the advertised/write path (for example `briefs/<cardId>-<slug>.md`) or have James POST the exact written path back via `recordBrief`, then only auto-link that exact path. Add a regression test with two Discuss cards whose titles normalize to the same slug and verify one cannot auto-link the other's brief.
